'''鈭歨-d-s-l''' ('''kahadseloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:umbeschew|umbeschew]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-d-s-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:umbeschew|umbeschew]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歨-d-s-l
|-
! Lemma
| kahadseloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
